creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
Exp-run fails to start:


[00:00:14] Warning: (audio/abraca): Error: audio/abraca depends on nonexistent origin 'x11-themes/gnome-themes-standard' (moved to ); Please contact maintainer of the port to fix this.
[00:00:22] Warning: (deskutils/gnome-calendar): Error: deskutils/gnome-calendar depends on nonexistent origin 'x11-toolkits/libdazzle' (moved to ); Please contact maintainer of the port to fix this.
[00:00:22] Warning: (deskutils/gnome-photos): Error: deskutils/gnome-photos depends on nonexistent origin 'x11-toolkits/libdazzle' (moved to ); Please contact maintainer of the port to fix this.
[00:00:41] Warning: (misc/lxde-common): Error: misc/lxde-common depends on nonexistent origin 'x11-themes/gnome-themes-standard' (moved to ); Please contact maintainer of the port to fix this.
[00:01:10] Warning: (x11/cinnamon): Error: x11/cinnamon depends on nonexistent origin 'x11-themes/gnome-themes-standard' (moved to ); Please contact maintainer of the port to fix this.
[00:01:13] Warning: (x11-themes/gtk-arc-themes): Error: x11-themes/gtk-arc-themes depends on nonexistent origin 'x11-themes/gnome-themes-standard' (moved to ); Please contact maintainer of the port to fix this.



devel/glib20-reference ,  devel/libsoup-reference , x11/gnome-desktop-reference , x11-toolkits/gtk30-reference , x11-toolkits/pango-reference have all targets duplicated  (double inclusion of bsd.port.mk ?)
